_comment_topics: Topic catalog — single source of truth for BOTH tracks. Each topic has an `id` (readable join key), an `intent`, a `web` phrasing (Google SERP/News, keyword-style) and an `llm` phrasing (ChatGPT/Perplexity, conversational). Both tracks run the SAME topics, each in its native idiom. FREELY EDITABLE: add / remove / reword on demand — each run is a self-contained snapshot, so there is no time series to protect. Use `python pipeline.py --list-topics` to see the current set.

topics.llm: What comes in the Inito starter pack?
Does Inito work with HSA or FSA?
Does Inito only work on iPhone?
Does Inito use your phone's camera to read results?
Do you have to clip or attach Inito to your phone?
What is the Inito InSight Wireless Reader?
What's the best at-home fertility monitor?
What's the best ovulation test in 2026?

topics.web: at-home PdG LH estrogen FSH test
topics.llm: What at-home test measures PdG, LH, estrogen and FSH?

topics.web: is Mira more accurate than Inito
topics.llm: Is Mira more accurate than Inito?

topics.web: Inito vs blood test for fertility hormones
topics.llm: Inito vs blood tests for fertility hormones
Inito vs alternatives for fertility monitoring
What are common problems with Inito?
Why do people say Inito is inaccurate?

_comment_ads: Google Ads Transparency Center start URLs (one advertiser per URL). Build them at https://adstransparency.google.com by searching the advertiser/domain, then copy the resulting URL (keep region=US). Inito's own advertiser URL first (catches our own stale ad copy = highest priority), competitors after. Leave empty to skip the ads source.
_comment_llm_surfaces: Live-web AI assistants, each scraped through its own web-interface actor (see actors below). These behave like a real user (live web search + citations) — no training-data-only API calls.
_comment_llm_sampling: llm_num_runs: each (prompt x surface) is sampled this many times (one row per run in the snapshot — no aggregation). ChatGPT (Apify actor) draws a fresh US session per run (proxy_country pins US); Perplexity (sonar API) has no IP control, so its runs capture model variance.
_comment_claims: Heuristic regex (case-insensitive) for the OLD (phone-dependent) product. Used only to (a) extract prices and (b) hint the judge / its offline fallback so `says_about_inito` can note when a source still describes the old product. NOTE: the four hormones (E3G/estrogen, LH, PdG, FSH), the companion app, the dip-strip workflow and accuracy claims are common to BOTH products — do not add patterns for them.
_comment_owned: Matched by SUFFIX in code, so every inito.com subdomain (blog., ng., AND preprod./staging.) counts as owned — that closes the gap where a preprod URL was mis-tagged third_party. App-store / amazon listings are owned only for Inito's own listings: amazon /dp/ ASINs -> owned_marketplace; app-store pages matched by owned_app_ids; ads matched by advertiser name. Non-production hosts (preprod./staging./dev.…) are still owned but flagged `nonprod_url` in the sheet so an accidentally-public/cited staging page is visible.
_comment_competitor_brands: Brand names for offline-fallback competition detection and to prime the judge. Display names can differ from domains (miracare.com -> 'Mira').

actors._comment: Confirm exact slugs + input schemas on each actor's Apify Store page before first run; slugs and input keys get versioned.
actors._comment_ads: Scrapes the Google Ads Transparency Center by startUrls (advertiser/domain). Input: startUrls [{url}], maxItems, proxyConfiguration. Output per ad: advertiserName, creativeId, format, url, previewUrl, variants[{text,...}]. NOT keyword search.
actors._comment_chatgpt: Live ChatGPT web search. Input: prompts (array), country (string, default US). Output: {id, prompt, response, citations:[{title,url,source,snippet}]}. Country pins the proxy; distinct IPs come from separate runs.
actors._comment_perplexity: Perplexity is NOT an Apify actor — it's a direct sonar API call (perplexity_complete in pipeline.py) needing PERPLEXITY_API_KEY. Web-interface scrapers (zhorex etc.) are anti-bot-walled; sonar is the reliable live-search equivalent.

limits._comment_perplexity_model: Perplexity sonar API model: 'sonar' (cheap, live search) or 'sonar-pro' (deeper). Used by perplexity_complete().
limits._comment_model: Sonnet for classification accuracy (above Haiku). claude-opus-4-8 for maximum accuracy. Current model IDs: https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/models
